title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called 1[the Deposit Insurance and Credit Guarantee Corporation] Act, 1961. (2) It extend to the whole of India. (3) It shall come into force on such date2 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 8, ibid., for "the Deposit Insurance Corporation" (w.e.f. 15-7-1978). 2. 1st January, 1962, vide notification No. G.S.R. 18, dated 28th December, 1961, see Gazette of India, Part II, sec. 3(i).
